input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.2.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.2.1.5
            TITLE: vehicles with wings must have two team members, one walking on each side of the vehicle

            CONTENT:
            rule D.2.1.5: Vehicles with wings must have two team members, one walking on each side of the vehicle
D.2.1.5 Vehicles with wings must have two team members, one walking on each side of the vehicle 
when the vehicle is being pushed

final_answer: D.2.1.5 Vehicles with wings must have two team members, one walking on each side of the vehicle when the vehicle is being pushed
